name: North Scottsdale Loan and Gold
description_short: North Scottsdale Loan & Gold is a pawn shop and collateral lender offering pawn loans, auto title loans, and precious metals buying in Scottsdale, AZ.
description_long:
North Scottsdale Loan & Gold operates as a full-service pawn shop and collateral-based lender in Scottsdale, Arizona. The company positions itself as an upscale alternative to traditional pawn brokers, emphasizing professional appraisals, secure storage, and customer service. The business is accessible via their website at northscottsdaleloan.com and maintains open hours including Sunday operations.

The company offers three primary service categories: (1) Pawn loans on items of value including luxury watches (Rolex, Breitling), jewelry, electronics, and designer goods with 90-day loan terms; (2) Auto title loans using vehicles, motorcycles, RVs, ATVs, tractors, and jet-skis as collateral, explicitly stating they work with borrowers without good credit or income; and (3) Gold and precious metals buying, including estate jewelry, diamonds, bullion, coins, and scrap gold. They also claim to handle exotic vehicles including Lamborghinis and Bentleys.

The company differentiates itself through several stated advantages: trained professional appraisers, 24-hour monitoring and Lloyds of London insurance coverage for stored items, fast processing times, competitive rates, and emphasis on customer privacy and respectful treatment. Customer testimonials highlight cleanliness, helpfulness, fair pricing relative to competitors, and Sunday availability. The staff is specifically mentioned by name (Josh and Shaina).

As a collateral-based lender, North Scottsdale Loan & Gold serves borrowers needing immediate cash who possess valuable items or vehicles. The primary caveat is that this model requires either valuable collateral or vehicle ownership, making it inaccessible to those without such assets. No APR, loan terms, or fee structures are disclosed on the website, leaving borrowing costs opaque.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Open on Sundays, offering access when other lenders are closed
Claims to offer competitive auto title loan rates 'legally offered' to borrowers without good credit or income
States all stored items are insured by Lloyds of London with 24-hour monitoring
Offers free appraisals on items before committing to a loan
Fast processing times with trained professional appraisers on staff
Positive customer testimonials specifically praising fair pricing and respectful treatment
Accepts wide range of collateral including luxury watches, vehicles, electronics, and precious metals
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website—borrowing costs are completely opaque
Auto title loans require relinquishing vehicle ownership as collateral, creating repossession risk
Requires valuable collateral or vehicle ownership, excluding borrowers without such assets
No information about loan terms, repayment flexibility, or what happens if unable to repay
Claims about exotic vehicle loans (Lamborghini, Bentley) are unverified and seem unlikely to be core business
best_for: Individuals with luxury watches, jewelry, or electronics who need fast cash and want to retain ownership through a pawn loan
Vehicle owners with poor credit who need short-term loans and cannot qualify through traditional lenders
People looking to sell gold, precious metals, or estate jewelry quickly for cash at fair market value
diagnosis: Best for borrowers with valuable collateral (jewelry, watches, electronics) or vehicle ownership who need quick cash and cannot access traditional credit. The main caveat is complete opacity around interest rates, fees, and repayment terms—borrowers must visit in person to learn actual costs, and title loans carry repossession risk.
services: Pawn loans on luxury watches (Rolex, Breitling, etc.)
Pawn loans on jewelry (estate, diamond, native)
Pawn loans on electronics and iPhones
Auto title loans on cars, motorcycles, RVs, ATVs, and tractors
Gold and precious metals buying and loaning
Silver and platinum jewelry loans and purchases
Vehicle storage and financing (exotic vehicles mentioned)
Secure 24-hour storage of pawned items with insurance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7126 E Shea Blvd Ste, Scottsdale, AZ 85254
